title: Elegant Elytras
description: A mod that introduces Beautiful custom wings with Elytra-based flight!
body:
![Elytra In Flight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IQGy8YnN/images/15b498f4fcc161acf98a744c7531728d010fc4bc.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them!
Looking for a beautiful pair of wings that outshine the Elytra, well look no further! This mod aims to add in MANY cosmetic wings based on the Elytra and using it as part of their crafting along with other materials, that will also hopefully not make it too difficult to customize these wings however you want! Many of these recipes also require Feathers, Phantom Membrane and Leather! This mod adds Three different Wings/Elytras, with plans to add MANY more in the future! Currently in the Mod are: - Several Different Angel Wings - Several Different Dragon/Demon Wings - Several Different Faerie Wings For Recipes, it's recommended you also use Just Enough Items Note that these wings, other than allowing Elytra-like flight, are purely cosmetic and currently do not have any other special abilities!
